title: Charles Schwab Launches Bitcoin and Ethereum Trading for US Customers
summary: Charles Schwab now allows select US customers to trade Bitcoin and Ethereum directly through their existing investment accounts. This move marks a significant step toward mainstream crypto adoption by a major financial institution.
body:
Charles Schwab, one of the largest investment firms in the US, has started offering Bitcoin and Ethereum trading to select customers. This service is now available directly through Schwab's existing investment platform, allowing users to trade crypto alongside stocks, bonds, and other traditional assets.

The new feature is currently in a limited rollout, with more users expected to gain access in the coming weeks. Schwab has partnered with Coinbase Custody to ensure secure storage of the cryptocurrencies traded on the platform. This integration is part of Schwab's broader strategy to expand its digital asset offerings.

For everyday investors, this development means easier access to cryptocurrencies without needing to use separate exchanges. It also signals growing acceptance of crypto as a legitimate asset class by traditional financial institutions. This could encourage more retail investors to explore Bitcoin and Ethereum as part of their portfolios.

Schwab's move follows similar steps by other major brokers like Fidelity and Interactive Brokers, indicating a trend toward mainstream crypto adoption. Users should watch for further announcements from Schwab regarding the full rollout and any additional features, such as staking or other DeFi services, that may be introduced in the future.
twitterThread: Charles Schwab now lets select US customers trade Bitcoin and Ethereum directly through their investment accounts. A big step for crypto adoption!
The service is currently in limited rollout, with Coinbase Custody handling secure storage. More users will gain access in the coming weeks.

This makes it easier for everyday investors to add crypto to their portfolios. Watch for full rollout details → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-13-charles-schwab-launches-bitcoin-and-ethereum-trading-for-us-customers
